source: 20 evenly sampled frames from the 240-frame no-cap bottle set

thresholds.low_count_rule: when pose inliers are below 8, require at least 5 grid cells and RMS <= 1.5 px

new_regression: frame_0133: 11 unique, 5 grid cells, 6/11 inliers, RMS 0.24 px; now accepted by the low-count high-precision gate
scope: Offline replay validates matching/PnP behavior only; it does not prove phone-screen cap visibility or alignment.
